text:
Once there lived a curious fox who loved adventure. Every day she would trot off into the forest, dreaming of thrilling quests.

One sunny morning, after nibbling on some peculiar mushrooms, she stumbled across a mysterious stone circle. Her nose twitched with wonder.

Within, there was an old owl perched atop. She fluttered down.

“I’ve heard tales of such places,” the owl crooned.

“Will I find something?” she inquired eagerly.

“You will!”

Together they journeyed deep into the heart of the forest.

There was an enchanted brook that sang soft melodies. She listened intently as swallows darted between the waves.

“Look,” she said excitedly.

Nearby danced a troop of elves practicing silken dancing leaps.

“You're in luck,” the owl said with a chuckle. “They’ve thrown their last ball. Come!”

So they spent an enchanted evening. The fox learned the dance, and when she saw the little dancers glide around the brook
